title: Pork Stew with Ukrainian Twist
description: Hearty pork stew with tender meat and a hint of Ukrainian spices.
instructions: Heat oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Add the pork cubes and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Remove the pork from the pot and set aside.
Add the chopped onion to the pot and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add the chopped carrots and potatoes, dried thyme, salt, and black pepper. Cook for 5 minutes.
Add the browned pork back to the pot, along with the bay leaves.
Pour in enough stock to cover the meat and vegetables, then bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 1 1/2 hours, or until the meat is tender.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
